title: MobCash
description: A plugin which integrates with paperx to add new loot drops to mobs
body:
**MobCash: Transform Monster Hunting into a Lucrative Adventure**

MobCash revolutionizes the monster-hunting experience in Minecraft by introducing a customizable economy system where defeated mobs drop real cash that players can collect and spend. This plugin seamlessly integrates with PaperX commands to create an immersive and rewarding gameplay experience.

**Key Features:

🪙 Customizable Currency Drops**

Configure different denominations ($1, $5, $10, $20, $50, $100, $500, $1000)

Set unique drop rates for each mob type in your server

Adjust the probability of specific currency values for balanced progression
**
🐉 Special Boss Rewards**

Boss mobs like the Ender Dragon, Wither, and Elder Guardian drop premium cash notes

Custom banknotes display which legendary creature they came from

Higher-value denominations from challenging enemies

**⚙️ Fully Configurable**

Fine-tune drop chances for every mob type

Adjust denomination distribution percentages

Customize player notifications and message formatting

Enable/disable debug mode for troubleshooting

**🌎 Seamless Integration**

Works with PaperX's money commands to handle currency transactions

Compatible with most economy plugins

Easy to set up without complex dependencies

**💬 Player Notifications**

Alert players when valuable cash drops nearby

Configurable notification radius

Color-coded messages for better visibility

**👑 Admin Controls**

Simple command interface for server administrators

Quick reload capability without server restart

Permission-based command access

This plugin adds a compelling economic dimension to combat, encouraging players to hunt specific mobs for better rewards. The excitement of discovering which denomination drops—whether a humble $1 note from a zombie or a rare $1000 bill from the Ender Dragon—creates memorable moments during gameplay.
